name: Saibalana
description: Saibalana (SBNA) is a deflationary BEP-20 token built on BNB Smart Chain with a strictly fixed supply of 21,000 tokens — mirroring the scarcity model of Bitcoin. Designed for long-term value preservation, Saibalana combines limited issuance with decentralized liquidity on PancakeSwap to create a high-value digital asset. No additional tokens will ever be minted.
